productDisplayName: Nike Men Dunk High Grey Casual Shoes
description: The nike Dunk High VT Premium: Classic top-flight construction. A vintage Basketball icon from 1985, the nike Dunk High VT Premium shoe is updated with high-quality material and the same superb cushioning and comfort as the original. Wear these high-tops to show off your vintage Sports knowledge – the premium shine of these patent leather shoes will look great along with jeans and a bright coloured tee. Upper Patent leather upper for comfort, molded for great style Perforations on toe for ventilation High top style to support ankle Top-stitching and haul loop on back heel Stylish lace-up system for a customised snug Fit Padded collar and tongue and mesh on tongue inner Branding etched on tongue Midsole EVA midsole for cushioning Midsole stitched to shoe for strength and style Outsole Rubber outsole for durability and traction Pivot point and grooves for traction and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
